resources.title: Audio Debrief
resources.note: Listen-first summary of today’s progress and next steps.

resources.title: Core Achievement
resources.note: Global Configurator evolved from prototype to operating map system with app/data separation, import pipeline, and map-everything scope.

resources.title: Key build outcomes
resources.note: Mobile tab UX, Save/Main/Resources, layout modes, visible levels, free-pan camera, smoother focus motion.

resources.title: Import pathways
resources.note: Converted TheBrain and GitMind exports to Global Configurator JSON; preserved notes/resources where present.

resources.title: Insight
resources.note: Separation of software and content is foundational for safe collaboration and long-term scaling.

resources.title: Insight
resources.note: Interaction quality (zoom, transitions, navigation) is core to cognition, not cosmetic.

resources.title: Insight
resources.note: Map-everything framing is now explicit: personal, work, projects, decisions, resources, and agents as one category.

resources.title: Next step
resources.note: Add native chronology tab + metadata editor.

resources.title: Next step
resources.note: Add import diagnostics and snapshot index for governance.
